---
title: "Calculating L-function (weighted)"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
.libPaths("/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/")
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(spicyR)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(scClassify)
  library(caret) 
  library(spatstat.geom)
  library(data.table)
  library(Statial)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
})
```

```{r}
load(".RData")
```

## Attach confidence weights to closePairs

```{r}
# closePairs are unchanged from the unweighted version
# just attach confidence scores as a weight columne
cells = colData(speSub) |> as.data.frame()
imageList = split(cells, cells$imageID)

# assign confidence score as a weight
for (imgID in names(imageResults)) {
  confScores = imageList[[imgID]]$confidenceScore
  # using the confidence score of the centre cell 
  imageResults[[imgID]]$closePairs$weight = confScores[as.integer(imageResults[[imgID]]$closePairs$i)]
}
```

## Calculate L-function (weighted)

$$\widehat{K}^w_{ij}(r) = \frac{|W|}{n_i n_j} \sum_{n_i} \sum_{n_j} \mathbf{1} \{d_{ij} \leq r\} , e_{ij}(r) \cdot w_i$$      

```{r}
cellTypes = unique(cells$cellType)
cellTypes = cellTypes[!is.na(cellTypes)]
pairs = expand.grid(child1 = cellTypes, child2 = cellTypes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

LfuncW = bplapply(names(imageResults), function(imgID) {
  closePairs = imageResults[[imgID]]$closePairs
  area = imageResults[[imgID]]$area

  # weight each neighbour contribution by the centre cell's confidence score
  counts = closePairs[, .(n = sum(edge * weight, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(i, cellTypeI, cellTypeJ)]
  counts = dcast(counts, i + cellTypeI ~ cellTypeJ, value.var = "n", fill = 0)

  pairResults = lapply(seq_len(nrow(pairs)), function(k) {
    child1 = pairs$child1[k]
    child2 = pairs$child2[k]

    if (!child1 %in% closePairs$cellTypeI | !child2 %in% closePairs$cellTypeJ) {
      return(data.frame(imageID = imgID, child1 = child1, child2 = child2, L = NA))
    }

    L = Statial:::.Lfunction(closePairs, counts, child1, child2, r, area)
    data.frame(imageID = imgID, child1 = child1, child2 = child2, L = L)
  })
  dplyr::bind_rows(pairResults)
}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 20))

LfuncW = dplyr::bind_rows(LfuncW)
```

```{r}
# combine with metadata
cDat = colData(speSub) |> as.data.frame() |> dplyr::distinct(subject, imageID, slide, biopsy_cellular_grading, biopsy_antibody_grading,
                                                             biopsy_rejection_type, days_from_transplant_to_biopsy, biopsy_timing, age_at_biopsy,
                                                             cav_grade, death, patient_cellular_grading, patient_rejection_type, resolution_broad,
                                                             treatment)

LfuncW = merge(LfuncW, cDat, by = "imageID")
LfuncW$cellType_pair = paste0(LfuncW$child1, "__", LfuncW$child2)

head(LfuncW)
```

### Mixed-effects models

```{r warning = F, message = F}
pairList = dplyr::distinct(LfuncW, child1, child2)

weightsModels = lapply(seq_len(nrow(pairList)), function(k) {
  child1 = pairList$child1[k]
  child2 = pairList$child2[k]

  dat = LfuncW |>
    dplyr::filter(child1 == !!child1, child2 == !!child2) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(L), !is.na(resolution_broad))

  if (length(unique(dat$resolution_broad)) < 2 | nrow(dat) < 5) {
    return(data.frame(child1 = child1, child2 = child2, p.value = NA, estimate = NA))
  }

  fit = tryCatch(lmer(L ~ resolution_broad + (1 | subject), data = dat),
    error = function(e) NULL)

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(data.frame(child1 = child1, child2 = child2, p.value = NA, estimate = NA))
  }

  coef = summary(fit)$coefficients
  data.frame(child1 = child1, child2 = child2, estimate = coef[2, "Estimate"], p.value = coef[2, "Pr(>|t|)"])
})

weightsModels = dplyr::bind_rows(weightsModels)
weightsModels = weightsModels |> rename(c(from = child1, to = child2))
weightsModels$p.adj = p.adjust(weightsModels$p.value, method = "BH")
```



```{r}
table(is.na(LfuncW$L))
```

```{r}
LfuncW
```
